public_reputation: Wharf-shrine keeper for sailors, vows, and drowned-name candles.
appearance: Maritime ritual detail, polished devotional tokens, and port-worthy fabrics tie worship to tide, memory, and exchange.
manner: Balances comfort with correction, sounding gentle until rite, taboo, or consequence is threatened. In Cosmouth, that reads as someone maritime, urbane, and commercially fluid, balancing archive-minded memory with port pragmatism, and the habits of a priests still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of priests in and around Coralhaven Port, Cosmouth, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Coralhaven Port, Cosmouth workable through the obligations of priests while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Cosmouth.
hidden_pressure: Must keep sacred procedure credible while grief, fear, or opportunism press for shortcuts. Around Coralhaven Port, Cosmouth, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of priests visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Any alliance with Sister Lune Carrow can expose the party to taboo, doctrine, or institutional expectation centered on Coralhaven Port, Cosmouth.
Sister Lune Carrow needs discreet aid to prevent a ritual lapse, desecration, or public crisis of trust around Coralhaven Port, Cosmouth.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
